title: elsholtzia splendens var. fasciflora
intro: Elsholtzia splendens var. fasciflora, also known as Rock mint or Chinese hyssop, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and aiding in respiratory problems. Elsholtzia splendens var. fasciflora can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties.
